lore:quest.name: The First Word
lore:quest.description: The stones spoke to the Awoken at the ruins — now Maelis Vane can bind what they said into a spell tome. Gather 5 lapis lazuli and 3 paper, and learn the first word of the old tongue. Unlocks the path of magic.
steps: Complete 'Echoes Beneath' so the stones have spoken to you.
Accept the quest from Maelis Vane in her archive.
Return to Maelis and turn them in through her dialogue.
